title: CHANGE THROUGH COMPASSION - 211info
text: OREGON WASHINGTON HEALTH NETWORK CHANGE THROUGH COMPASSION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community-based supports that prevent, reduce, or interrupt violence and/or prevent involvement in the criminal legal system through anger management, parenting, and domestic violence intervention education and skills clases. 200 SE Hailey Avenue Suite 307 Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Caring Dads: Male-identifying individuals All other services: Individuals returning from incarceration and/or currently under supervision, such as probation or parole. Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 663-4104 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 663-4104 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, no one is turned away for an inability to pay DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties Services: Anger Management Domestic Violence Intervention Programs Parenting Skills Classes * Men Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - COPES 4 YOUTH PEER CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - COPES OUTPATIENT SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - NURTURE OREGON If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON WASHINGTON HEALTH NETWORK
